codeReview.summary: The feature implementation satisfies the requested behavior: the forgot-password flow now builds `redirectTo` from `window.location.origin + '/reset-password'`, the reviewed auth route set contains no remaining `localhost:3000` references, and regression tests were added for the changed flow. I found one non-blocking test isolation issue in the new test file.

issues.description: The test that mocks `window.location.origin` does not restore the original `window.location`. At line 76 it reassigns `value: window.location`, which is already the mocked object from line 57, so the fake origin can leak into later tests and make the suite order-dependent.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker handoff reports `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`, but the transcript for session `b4cb8988-e11a-43df-8290-9cc8007db7b4` shows the source file was edited before the new test was created, and there were no `agent-browser` manual verification steps. The `web-worker` skill still requires both TDD-first work and manual verification, so either adherence reporting needs tightening or the procedure should explicitly allow exceptions for small fixes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/web-worker/SKILL.md lines 24-26 require writing tests first and lines 41-43 require manual verification with agent-browser; the transcript skeleton shows `Edit` on `packages/web/app/routes/forgot-password.tsx` before `Create` of `packages/web/app/__tests__/routes/forgot-password.test.tsx`, and no browser-tool invocation appears in the reviewed session before `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` was set to true.

summary: Reviewed commit `92414aa` for `fix-forgot-password-url`. The production code change is correct and meets the feature contract; I recorded one non-blocking test cleanup issue and one skill-adherence/shared-state observation.
